tiers.label: Early Bird
tiers.description: Early registration discount. Contact secretariat to confirm eligibility.

tiers.label: Till 31 March 2026
tiers.description: Standard rate for registrations completed by 31 March 2026.

tiers.label: 1 Apr – 30 Jun 2026
tiers.description: Standard rate for registrations from 1 April to 30 June 2026.

tiers.label: Spot Registration
tiers.description: On-site registration at the conference venue, subject to seat availability.
